Temple Tours கோவில் சுற்றுலா

Kanchipuram Temple Trip (Half Day from Chennai) காஞ்சிபுரம் Temple Trip (Half Day from சென்னை)

Kanchipuram is close, peaceful, and perfect for quick temple visits. We keep the pricing simple & transparent so families and senior citizens can travel confidently. Trip Overview - Chennai → Kanchipuram → Chennai - 150 km approx - Half-day or full-day options - Great for: temple visits, shopping, senior citizens காஞ்சிபுரம் is close, peaceful, and perfect for quick temple visits. We keep the pricing simple & transparent so families and senior citizens can travel confidently. Trip கண்ணோட்டம் - சென்னை → காஞ்சிபுரம் → சென்னை - 150 km approx - Half-day or full-day options - Great for: temple visits, shopping, senior citizens

What's Included சேர்க்கப்பட்டுள்ளது

  • Car + professional driver
  • Assistance for senior citizens
  • Flexible timings
  • Free temple parking guidance
  • Car + professional driver
  • Assistance for senior citizens
  • Flexible timings
  • Free temple parking guidance

Not Included சேர்க்கப்படவில்லை

  • Parking (actuals)
  • Toll charges (if route via highway)
  • Parking (actuals)

Travel Guide & Tips பயண வழிகாட்டி & குறிப்புகள்

History & Significance வரலாறு & சிறப்பு

Known as the 'City of Thousand Temples', Kanchipuram was the capital of the Pallava dynasty. It is one of the seven sacred cities (Mokshapuri) in India. Known as the 'City of Thousand Temples', Kanchipuram was the capital of the Pallava dynasty. It is one of the seven sacred cities (Mokshapuri) in India.

Darshan Timings தரிசன நேரங்கள்

Most temples: 6:00 AM – 12:30 PM & 4:00 PM – 8:30 PM Most temples: 6:00 AM – 12:30 PM & 4:00 PM – 8:30 PM

Dress Code ஆடை கட்டுப்பாடு

Traditional wear recommended. Modest clothing is mandatory. Traditional wear recommended. Modest clothing is mandatory.

Pro Tips for First-Timers முக்கிய குறிப்புகள்

  • Visit Ekambareswarar Temple first (largest).
  • Kamakshi Amman Temple is the heart of the city.
  • Don't miss the famous Kanchipuram Silk Saree shopping.
  • Varadharaja Perumal Temple has the famous Golden & Silver Lizards.
  • Visit Ekambareswarar Temple first (largest).
  • Kamakshi Amman Temple is the heart of the city.
  • Don't miss the famous Kanchipuram Silk Saree shopping.
  • Varadharaja Perumal Temple has the famous Golden & Silver Lizards.

Frequently Asked Questions அடிக்கடி கேட்கப்படும் கேள்விகள்

Q: Best start time? Best start time?

Early morning 6–7 AM avoids traffic & temple rush. Early morning 6–7 AM avoids traffic & temple rush.

Q: Can we visit 3–4 temples? Can we visit 3–4 temples?

Yes — customise as you wish. Yes — customise as you wish.
